Interface IUtilityNetworkEquipmentIdentifiers

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Manages equipment identifiers in a telecom domain network.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A609E41F-E347-48F5-B3AD-12F4A9B4E46E")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkEquipmentIdentifiers
